prs.title: feat: add product from AWS Marketplace URL + edit company name
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Adds AWS Marketplace URL product ingestion plus company name editing across 10 files spanning actions, components, a new AWS library, and E2E tests — a meaningful dual-feature addition.

prs.title: fix(studio): Bedrock toolConfig on competitive-analysis finalize (prod hotfix)
prs.author: Chad
prs.rationale: Targeted hotfix correcting Bedrock toolConfig for competitive-analysis finalize with a small agent change and accompanying unit test.

prs.title: fix(readiness): scope Product.marketplaceListingId unique per company (prod hotfix)
prs.author: Chad
prs.rationale: Scopes a unique constraint on marketplace listing IDs per company via a schema change, migration, collector update, and dedup test — a focused data integrity fix.

prs.title: fix(automation): enforce tenant isolation on automation actions
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Enforces tenant isolation across automation control, tools, agent, and server actions in six files, addressing a meaningful security/correctness concern with test coverage.

prs.title: fix(studio): enqueue BTS generation directly from assessment + strategy slides
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small two-file fix wiring BTS generation enqueue directly from assessment and strategy slide components.

prs.title: Revert #475 (guided-experience UI / action-needed tray) out of staging
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Reverts a 17-file guided-experience UI feature out of staging, requiring careful restoration of prior state across components, layout, and sandbox pages.

prs.title: Terraform IaC foundation for AWS Cognito migration
prs.author: Chad
prs.rationale: Establishes a full Terraform IaC foundation for AWS Cognito migration across 44 files including CI/CD workflows, bootstrap modules, environment configs, and module definitions — a major infrastructure architectural addition.

prs.title: Sm 565/guided experience UI
prs.author: Mauro
prs.rationale: Implements a full guided-experience UI with tray, task cards, inline prompts, assignee selectors, CRM connect panel, and app shell integration across 17 files and 1400 lines.

prs.title: Studio: move BTS & Competitive Analysis generation to background workers
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Moves BTS and Competitive Analysis generation to background BullMQ workers, touching AI agents, schema, migrations, API routes, studio components, hooks, and enqueue utilities across 26 files — a significant architectural shift.

prs.title: fix(docker): ship docs/ into runner image so admin docs load
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Trivial single-file Dockerfile tweak to include the docs directory in the runner image.

prs.title: fix(docker): ship docs/ into runner image so admin docs load
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Duplicate of PR #472 — trivial single-file Dockerfile fix to ship docs into the runner image.

prs.title: Playbook editing + AI assistant guided flow
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Delivers playbook editing UI, AI assistant guided flow, automation agent tooling, schema/migration changes, and performance pages across 35 files — a major multi-faceted feature spanning AI, admin, and core platform.

stories.name: AWS Marketplace Product Onboarding & Company Management
stories.rationale: Enables users to add products directly from AWS Marketplace URLs and edit company names, streamlining product onboarding from the AWS ecosystem.

stories.name: AI Studio Background Processing & Reliability
stories.rationale: Moves BTS and Competitive Analysis generation to background workers for scalability, fixes Bedrock toolConfig issues in production, and ensures BTS generation can be enqueued directly from assessment and strategy slides.

stories.name: Marketplace Listing Data Integrity Fix
stories.rationale: Hotfix scoping the marketplace listing ID uniqueness constraint per company to prevent cross-tenant data collisions.

stories.name: Tenant Isolation & Security Hardening
stories.rationale: Enforces strict tenant isolation on automation actions to ensure no cross-tenant data leakage in multi-tenant environments.

stories.name: Guided Experience & Action-Needed Tray UI
stories.rationale: Introduced a guided experience UI with an action-needed tray, then reverted it from staging due to instability, capturing the full spike and rollback cycle.

stories.name: AWS Cognito Identity Infrastructure Migration
stories.rationale: Lays the Terraform IaC foundation for migrating authentication to AWS Cognito, enabling a scalable and managed identity platform.

stories.name: Playbook Editing with AI-Assisted Guided Flow
stories.rationale: Delivers playbook editing capabilities with an AI assistant guided flow, helping users build and refine business readiness playbooks interactively.

stories.name: Admin Documentation Availability Fix
stories.rationale: Fixed Docker runner image to include the docs directory so that admin documentation loads correctly in deployed environments.
